# Feature request

Thanks for suggesting an improvement to Friday.

## Problem

What workflow is hard, missing, or unreliable today?

## Proposed behavior

What would you like Friday to do?

## Why this fits Friday

Friday is local-first and privacy-first. Please note whether this feature keeps
audio, transcripts, and telemetry on-device.

## Alternatives considered

Any workaround or simpler version that would also help?

## Extra context

Screenshots, examples, related tools, or notes from real usage are welcome.
